case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ANTHONY D. ROUMPH et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
